props.name: actionConfiguration
props.desc: The action to execute when the button is clicked.

props.name: buttonType
props.desc: Visual style of the button.

props.name: icon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name displayed on the button.

props.name: iconPosition
props.desc: Whether the icon appears before ('start') or after ('end') the label.

props.name: gap
props.desc: Spacing between buttons.

props.name: isInline
props.desc: Render buttons inline rather than as a block.

props.name: items
props.desc: The buttons and groups in this button group.

props.name: dataSourceType
props.desc: Where dropdown options come from: 'referenceList' or 'values'.

props.name: disabledValues
props.desc: Array of option values that are disabled (greyed out).

props.name: disableItemValue
props.desc: Script returning an array of values to disable dynamically.

props.name: displayStyle
props.desc: How selected options are rendered: 'tags' or 'text'.

props.name: filter
props.desc: JSON Logic expression filtering which reference list items are shown.

props.name: ignoredValues
props.desc: Array of option values excluded from the dropdown.

props.name: incomeCustomJs
props.desc: Script transforming the stored value before it is displayed.

props.name: labelCustomJs
props.desc: Script returning a custom display label for the current value.

props.name: mode
props.desc: Single-select or multi-select mode.

props.name: outcomeCustomJs
props.desc: Transform the selected value before it is stored on the form.

props.name: referenceListId
props.desc: Reference list to populate options from when dataSourceType is "referenceList".

props.name: showIcon
props.desc: Show the option icon alongside the label.

props.name: showItemName
props.desc: Show the option's internal name rather than its label.

props.name: solidColor
props.desc: Fill the tag background with the option color.

props.name: tag
props.desc: Style configuration applied to selected value tags.

props.name: valueFormat
props.desc: Shape of the stored value when an option is selected.

props.name: values
props.desc: Static list of options when dataSourceType is "values".

props.name: highPrecision
props.desc: Use high-precision decimal arithmetic for the field value.

props.name: prefix
props.desc: Text or symbol displayed before the number input.

props.name: prefixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").

props.name: stepNumeric
props.desc: Increment/decrement amount when using the step buttons.

props.name: stepString
props.desc: Step amount expressed as a string (used for large-number precision).

props.name: suffix
props.desc: Text or symbol displayed after the number input.

props.name: suffixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").

props.name: prefix
props.desc: Static text or icon shown before the input.

props.name: prefixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").

props.name: regExp
props.desc: A valid regular expression string used to validate the field value (e.g. "^[a-z]+$").

props.name: spellCheck
props.desc: Enable browser spell-checking in this field.

props.name: suffix
props.desc: Static text or icon shown after the input.

props.name: suffixIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").

props.name: textType
props.desc: Input type: 'text', 'password', 'email', 'url', etc.

props.name: allowClear
props.desc: Show a clear button to reset the textarea.

props.name: autoSize
props.desc: Grow the textarea height automatically to fit its content.

props.name: passEmptyStringByDefault
props.desc: Submit an empty string rather than null when the field is blank.

props.name: showCount
props.desc: Show the character count below the textarea.

props.name: spellCheck
props.desc: Enable browser spell-checking in this field.

props.name: dataSourceType
props.desc: Where checkbox options come from: 'referenceList' or 'values'.

props.name: dataSourceUrl
props.desc: API URL to fetch options from (used when dataSourceType is 'url').

props.name: direction
props.desc: Layout direction of the checkboxes.

props.name: items
props.desc: Static list of options when dataSourceType is "values".

props.name: mode
props.desc: Whether one or multiple checkboxes can be selected.

props.name: reducerFunc
props.desc: Receives the raw items list; return a transformed array of { label, value } items.

props.name: referenceListId
props.desc: Reference list to populate options from when dataSourceType is "referenceList".

props.name: dataSourceType
props.desc: Where radio options come from: 'referenceList' or 'values'.

props.name: dataSourceUrl
props.desc: API URL to fetch options from (used when dataSourceType is 'url').

props.name: direction
props.desc: Layout direction of the radio buttons.

props.name: items
props.desc: Static list of options when dataSourceType is "values".

props.name: reducerFunc
props.desc: Receives the raw items list; return a transformed array of { label, value } items.

props.name: referenceListId
props.desc: Reference list to populate options from when dataSourceType is "referenceList".

props.name: max
props.desc: Maximum value of the slider.

props.name: min
props.desc: Minimum value of the slider.

props.name: dateFormat
props.desc: Moment.js date format string (e.g. "DD/MM/YYYY").

props.name: defaultToMidnight
props.desc: Set the default time to midnight (00:00:00) when no time is selected.

props.name: disabledDateFunc
props.desc: Receives current (moment); return true to disable that date.

props.name: disabledDateMode
props.desc: none: no restriction; functionTemplate: use disabledDateTemplate body; customFunction: use disabledDateFunc.

props.name: disabledDateTemplate
props.desc: JS function body (not a full function declaration) evaluated to disable specific dates. Return true to disable. Example: "return current && current < moment().endOf("day");"

props.name: disabledTimeFunc
props.desc: Return { disabledHours, disabledMinutes, disabledSeconds } functions.

props.name: disabledTimeMode
props.desc: none: no restriction; timeFunctionTemplate: use disabledTimeTemplate preset; customFunction: use disabledTimeFunc.

props.name: disabledTimeTemplate
props.desc: Preset template: disabledPastTime disables times before now; disableFutureTime disables times after now.

props.name: monthFormat
props.desc: Moment.js month format string (e.g. "MM/YYYY").

props.name: picker
props.desc: Calendar display mode: 'date', 'week', 'month', 'quarter', or 'year'.

props.name: quarterFormat
props.desc: Moment.js quarter format string (e.g. "YYYY-[Q]Q").

props.name: range
props.desc: Enable range selection (stores a start and end date).

props.name: resolveToUTC
props.desc: Convert the selected date to UTC before storing.

props.name: showNow
props.desc: Show a 'Now' shortcut in the date picker.

props.name: showTime
props.desc: Include a time picker alongside the date picker.

props.name: timeFormat
props.desc: Moment.js time format string (e.g. "HH:mm:ss").

props.name: weekFormat
props.desc: Moment.js week format string (e.g. "YYYY-[W]WW").

props.name: yearFormat
props.desc: Moment.js year format string (e.g. "YYYY").

props.name: allowClear
props.desc: Show a clear button to reset the time field.

props.name: autoFocus
props.desc: Automatically focus the time picker on mount.

props.name: format
props.desc: Moment.js time format string (e.g. "HH:mm", "HH:mm:ss", "hh:mm a").

props.name: hideDisabledOptions
props.desc: Hide (instead of grey out) time options restricted by disabledTimeTemplate.

props.name: hourStep
props.desc: Interval between hour options. Must be a positive integer that divides 24 evenly (e.g. 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12).

props.name: inputReadOnly
props.desc: Prevent manual keyboard input; force selection from the picker.

props.name: minuteStep
props.desc: Interval between minute options. Must be a positive integer that divides 60 evenly (e.g. 1, 5, 10, 15, 30).

props.name: range
props.desc: Enable range selection (stores a start and end time).

props.name: secondStep
props.desc: Interval between second options. Must be a positive integer that divides 60 evenly (e.g. 1, 5, 10, 15, 30).

props.name: showNow
props.desc: Show a 'Now' shortcut to select the current time.

props.name: use12Hours
props.desc: Display the time in 12-hour format with AM/PM.

props.name: count
props.desc: Number of stars to display. Must be a positive integer.

props.name: icon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").
